title: File download results in forbidden error
symptom: When attempting to download a file using the provided URL, n8n returns a 'Forbidden' error, preventing the download from occurring.
applies_when: Using httpRequest node to download a file
File URL is obtained from a trigger node
not_this_if: Using a direct file download node
File URL is valid and accessible
root_cause: The error occurs because the method used to download the file is incorrect. The httpRequest node is not configured properly to handle file downloads directly from the URL provided by the trigger node.
fix_steps: Add a new node specifically for downloading files
Connect the new file download node to the workflow
Configure the new node with the correct parameters to fetch the file
agent_instruction: Replace the httpRequest node with a dedicated file download node in your workflow.
